eval-001-eiffel-ground.note: Both fail — sky only, no 3D tiles

eval-003-eiffel-south.note: Baseline has slightly better south-to-north framing

eval-005-nyc-skyline.note: 3D OSM buildings create actual skyline vs flat grid

rationale: Iteration 002 produces dramatically better results on the most challenging evals (NYC skyline with 3D buildings, Grand Canyon depth, Manhattan skyscrapers). The skill's new guidance about loading OSM Buildings for city views and using steeper pitch for canyon perspectives directly caused these improvements. The one baseline win (eval-003 framing) is minor. The 4 ties confirm no regressions on aerial/top-down views.
key_improvements: eval-005: Flat satellite grid → 3D Manhattan skyline with OSM buildings
eval-006: Flat horizon → visible canyon depth with steeper pitch
eval-008: Flat overhead imagery → 3D skyscraper cityscape
